    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    AlgorithmPlugin<G>
    Plugin factory for algorithms.
    interface 
    ModelPlugin<G>
    Plugin factory for probabilistic models.
    interface 
    ProblemPlugin<G>
    Plugin factory for optimization problems.
    interface 
    RepresentationPlugin<G>
    Plugin factory for representation components.
